apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys for programmatic access to the system.
apiKeys.createKeyDescription: Create a new API key for accessing the API.
apiKeys.deleteKeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete API key "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.confirmBulkDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected API keys? This action cannot be undone.
apiKeys.keyCreatedDescription: Your new API key has been created. Please copy and save it now - you won't be able to see it again.
apiKeys.keyWarning: Make sure to copy your API key now. You won't be able to see it again!
apiKeys.allowedAgentsHint: Select which applications this API key can access. Leave empty to allow all applications.
apiKeys.allowedWorkflowsHint: Select which workflows this API key can access. Leave empty to allow all workflows.
